properties.dose: Oral Low: 100mg Common: 100-150mg Strong: 150-175mg+ | Insufflated Light: 20-30mg Common: 30-40mg Strong: 50mg+
properties.summary: An analogue of dimethocaine with local anaesthetic and stimulant properties. The drug is often marketed in the research chemical scene as a cocaine replacement. There is little reported use of the drug.
